CustomField.description: Name and Billing Address of the Practice to which the Contract is directly related.
CustomField.formula: Contract__r.Account.FirstName&" "&Contract__r.Account.MiddleName&" "& Contract__r.Account.LastName&BR()& IF(ISBLANK(Contract__r.Account.BillingStreet), "", Contract__r.Account.BillingStreet &BR())& IF(ISBLANK(Contract__r.Account.BillingCity), "", Contract__r.Account.BillingCity & ", ") & Contract__r.Account.BillingState & " " & Contract__r.Account.BillingPostalCode & BR() & Contract__r.Account.BillingCountry
CustomField.label: First Location
